references.text: Limited edition Beatles tribute with yellow-tinted titanium and exclusive dial.

references.title: De Bethune DB28GS Aérolite
references.text: Limited edition featuring genuine meteorite dial and case components.

references.title: De Bethune DB28ST Starry Varius
references.text: Astronomical complication showing sidereal time with mobile star chart.

references.title: De Bethune DB28XS Digital
references.text: Innovative digital jumping hour display in traditional mechanical movement.

references.title: De Bethune DB15 Simple Tourbillon
references.text: De Bethune's first series production tourbillon with signature blue moon phase.

references.title: De Bethune DB22 Les Maîtres Horlogers
references.text: Limited edition celebrating three centuries of watchmaking masters with unique complications.

references.title: De Bethune DB29 Tourbillon Maxichrono
references.text: Revolutionary 30-second chronograph with tourbillon and triple pare-chute shock absorption.

references.title: De Bethune DBS Dream Watch 5
references.text: Fifth iteration of the Dream Watch series with ultimate Grand Sonnerie complication.

references.title: De Bethune DB10 Self-Winding
references.text: De Bethune's first production model establishing brand design language.
